event.name: Bottoms up! However many you may have!
event.description:
The Starved Delegation accepts the gift with tentative enthusiasm. The bouquet, however, seems to be to their liking.

A bored-looking Starved Man plonks a cauldron of amber onto the table. "Amber..." says the Starved Lithologer, looking to their compatriot for substantiation. "...is very important to us. But, of course, you already know that. Every Londoner knows that by now."

The Starved Man shrugs and shambles to the back of the group.

You will be able to join a fresh delegation once Time, the Healer comes.

messages.message: You moved to a new setting: The Fifth City.

possession.name: Recent Participant in a Starved Cultural Exchange
possession.nameAndLevel: Recent Participant in a Starved Cultural Exchange 1
possession.description: You've recently taken part in an exchange of cultural gifts with the Starved Men. This will go away with Time, the Healer.

possession.name: A Shaper of Starved Culture
possession.nameAndLevel: A Shaper of Starved Culture 91 - Starved Men are occasionally glimpsed in the streets of London. They are polite, constrain their anatomical eccentricities to within London's tastes, and don't shape anyone or anything else without express permission.

possession.description: You have facilitated the exchange of cultural tokens with some factions of the Starved Men.
